reviews.comment:

Tiramisu
turkey sandwich
Berliner Donut
pastry

My two favourite servers were Lyla and Shahbaaz. Lyla was friendly and very warmly welcoming, and Shahbaaz was very helpful and polite.

I'd come back just for the dessert & service, and their good discounts. It's a sweet place with both hi-fi and a welcoming atmosphere

Looking forward to welcoming you back for more moments and great offers.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet expectations. This has been noted and shared with our team, as we continuously work on improving both service and overall experience.

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/18251157111954801525/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kxd1JYcEVkbWxZWVhWSlNsQk9WVXh0TUhKNmJYYxAB

reviews.comment:
I recently visited Coffee Island and while the ambience was pleasant and well-maintained, the overall beverage experience was disappointing. I had ordered a Cappuccino and a Hazelnut got chocolate, but both tasted more like packed chocolate drinks than what was advertised. In addition, they were served only mildly warm, which affected the quality.
The promotional display outside the shop also felt misleading, as the products served did not match what was advertised.
The ambience is definitely good, but the coffee quality and accuracy need significant improvement.

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for sharing such a detailed note. Feedback like this genuinely helps us tighten the gaps. We are glad the ambience felt welcoming, and we have taken careful note of your observations on both beverages and the temperature they were served at. Our team is already reviewing this internally so we can understand exactly where the experience drifted from what we aim to deliver.

We would also like to understand more about what felt different from the promotional display, as accuracy matters to us. If you are open to it, please DM us on Instagram (@coffee.island.in) or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can look into this more closely.

We appreciate you bringing this to our attention and hope we can host you again for a much better cup.
